title: settings — compliance evidence
description: Dual-write to activity + audit is the primary control. Sensitive-field masking + KMS encryption cover confidentiality.

controls.evidence: Sensitive fields masked in reads + optional KMS encryption at rest. Every change dual-written to compliance audit.
PurgeSettingsForErasedUser + PurgeSettingsForErasedTenant listeners cascade on erasure events.
SettingField.sensitive flag surfaces at attribute declaration time — module authors declare intent explicitly.
audit_log rows produced by WriteSettingsChangeToAudit — who changed what, when.
KMS envelope encryption for sensitive fields. Reveal permission requires meta-audit.
Per-group permissions via AsSetting.permission + settings.update.{group}. Sensitive reveal permission separate.
Every config change captured in audit + activity. Rollback via previous audit row's old_value.
Permission gating per group + sensitive-reveal gate.
This module IS the configuration management surface. Every change captured.
